Defines the built-in RangeError object and its properties for the JerryScript engine.

# Purpose
This C header file defines macros and properties related to the `RangeError` built-in object in a JavaScript engine. It specifies the object identifier for `RangeError` using the `OBJECT_ID` macro and defines a number property, `LIT_MAGIC_STRING_LENGTH`, with a fixed value of 1 using the `NUMBER_VALUE` macro. Additionally, it sets an object property, `LIT_MAGIC_STRING_PROTOTYPE`, which points to the `RangeError` prototype using the `OBJECT_VALUE` macro. The file uses conditional compilation to define these macros only if they are not already defined, ensuring flexibility in how the macros are used or overridden in other parts of the codebase. The file concludes by undefining the macros to prevent potential conflicts with other code.
